info.name: CRA Mock API — Complete Test Suite
info.description:
Three scenarios:
1. Happy Path E2E — 14 steps, basic flow
2. Real World Flow — 28 steps, full consultant monthly workflow
3. Edge Cases — auth errors, validation errors, all activity/expense types, pagination

Prerequisites:
- Mock API on http://localhost:8005 (apidog/scripts/start_server.ps1)
- Environment 'CRA API MOCK DEV ENV' loaded
- Fixture files (python apidog/scripts/make_fixtures.py)

Import via: Apidog → Settings → Import Data → Postman → pick this file.

item.name: 01 — Happy Path E2E
item.description: 14-step happy path: login -> manage events -> submit -> sign -> expense -> filter -> cleanup.

item.name: 03 — Edge Cases
item.description: Negative tests and extended coverage. Run AFTER logging in via Real World or Happy Path so bearerToken is set.
